title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Go-based CLI and server that bundles, runs and serves Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and 30+ other GGUF models behind a REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and async SDK for the Ollama API; installable via pip.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; on npm as ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama as an LLM and embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama servers; runs in Docker or locally.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama with Kotlin extensions; published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps ollama commands with interactive model picker and progress bars.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community-curated recipes for running Ollama on Raspberry Pi, GPU clusters, CI jobs, etc.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and model sidecars on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-nvidia-docker
summary: Ready-to-run Docker Compose stack with Ollama + NVIDIA runtime and CUDA drivers.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Unofficial Dart/Flutter package for Ollama; supports desktop and mobile apps.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with async enumerables and System.Text.Json serialization.

title: ollama-macos-swiftui
summary: Native macOS SwiftUI app that wraps the Ollama server with chat UI and menu-bar icon.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Minimal RAG chatbot template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that exposes Ollama models as slash commands with per-guild model settings.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you query local Ollama models from within notes via commands.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled AWS EC2 instances with Ollama server pre-installed.
